column1: # Kanripo gaiji resolution map (P37-3) — the FAITHFUL codepoint subset.
# ref-id <TAB> unicode-glyph.  Consulted ONLY by --display reading on kanripo
# passages (config/display.yml sources: kanripo.gaiji: placeholder); a ref not
# listed here renders the placeholder box ⬚. Diplomatic/full keep refs verbatim.
# CENSUS-DERIVED, curated like MARK_CLASSES / EAST_ASIAN_WIDE: generated from the
# KR-Gaiji, CC BY-SA 4.0). The upstream charlist has 5,254 refs; this file ships
# ONLY the 972 whose “unicode representation” column is a single real
# Unicode codepoint (the character itself, now encoded in an extension plane) —
# 36.4% of all gaiji OCCURRENCES. The 707 refs carrying only a lossy “normalized
# version” (a substitute standard char, 51.8% of occurrences) and the 3,564
# image-only refs (11.2%) are deliberately EXCLUDED — placeholder, not fake glyph
# (owner honesty gate). Refresh: bin/nabu sync kr-gaiji, then regenerate.
